title: EnderPack
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Ender_Pack/BH_EP_header.webp) Do you think that having to put up and take down the ender chest is boring and unnecessary? Don't worry, this mod offers another solution, an ender backpack! You can use it in the same way as the ender chest, but in the form of a backpack, making it much more portable. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Ender_Pack/BH_EP_banner2.webp) In short, this new mod adds a single item, the ender backpack, which can be used as if it were an enderchest, but in this case, portable and easy to carry. The backpack has an innovative design, and can be placed on the ground or on the player's own back, which makes it a fantastic addiction. What are you waiting for to use it in your adventures? Thanks to Matt_Hopes for designing the look of the backpack! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Ender_Pack/BH_EP_banner1.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Ender_Pack/BH_EP_banner3.webp) ![Screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HaS8KaHF/images/d405c2e8ab9351c7fc2f693f9d60472852f30f32.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HaS8KaHF/images/b2f1cf242113f0cd132d931b19c83ef59be96a8b.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
